flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Macalester College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (84.5% → 73.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Macalester College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.5k → $68.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Macalester College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.5k → $68.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Macalester College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.5k → $23.0k).
